---
title: "03 · Validate & clean"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

> Phase 3 — tutorial style. Governance:
> `.claude/policies/analysis/data-contracts.md`, `data-integrity.md`,
> `missingness.md`, `outliers.md`.

Validate at the gates (raw before cleaning, analysis-ready before modeling),
verify join cardinality, handle missingness (mechanism-aware) and outliers
(detect → inspect → document) — then write the analysis-ready table to
`data/derived/` (regenerable; never committed).

```{r}
#| label: validate-clean
# Contract on raw data BEFORE cleaning (block on failure).
# pointblank::create_agent(raw) |> ... |> pointblank::interrogate()

# Verify a join's expected cardinality (1:1 / 1:m) and row counts before/after.
# Account for every dropped row (see missingness.md).
```
